headline: ROCE Insights For Intel
summary: Intel (NASDAQ: INTC) saw a drop in both earnings and sales after Q2. Earnings dropped to $5.66 billion, an 82.92% decrease from the previous quarter. Sales fell to $19.73 billion, down 0.5% from the previous quarter. In Q1, Intel earned $33.15 billion and total sales reached $19.83 billion.
